emotion_and_tone: Modern, innovative, undiscovered, high-impact, bold, kinetic.

typography.heading_font: Cabinet Grotesk, Space Grotesk, or Clash Display
rules: Headings MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) and font-black for maximum impact.
Body text should be highly legible, using text-slate-400 (text_secondary).
Do NOT exceed text-6xl for the main hero heading.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid for Services section. Aggressive asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-8 to p-12 minimum for cards with borders.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Primary CTA is bright orange with white text. Hover states MUST have higher contrast.
components.cards: 1px solid border (border_subtle), flat dark navy background. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) on hover.
components.accordion: Use Shadcn accordion for FAQ. Minimalist styling, border-b only, no cards.
components.form: Multi-step assessment form. Sleek glassmorphism or terminal-like inputs. Never use native inputs without Shadcn wrappers.

rules: Smooth entrance animations for grid items (staggered).
Hover states on all interactive elements.
Focus states MUST have an electric orange ring (focus:ring-[#FF5A00]).

pages_and_sections.name: Header
pages_and_sections.guidelines: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050B14]/70). Logo NOXN in font-black text-2xl. Primary CTA 'Let's begin' matching the form intent.

pages_and_sections.name: Hero Section
pages_and_sections.guidelines: Massive typography. Background image (hero_billboard) with bg-[#050B14]/60 overlay. Tagline should be bold. CTA 'Let's begin' prominent.

pages_and_sections.name: Services Section
pages_and_sections.guidelines: Bento Grid (Mode A). Showcasing 'Digital Billboard Ad Creation' and 'Billboard Ad Space Booking'. Use LED Texture image as background for one of the bento boxes.

pages_and_sections.name: How it works (Process)
pages_and_sections.guidelines: Step-by-step layout. Large numbers (e.g., 01, 02) in text_secondary with low opacity. Kinetic background image used subtly.

pages_and_sections.name: Pricing / Packages
pages_and_sections.guidelines: High-conversion cards. Tracing beam border effect or simple glowing border for the recommended package.

pages_and_sections.name: Assessment Form Section / Modal
pages_and_sections.guidelines: Multi-step form (campaign goal, budget, timing, location, business info). Header microcopy: 'Let's start prepping your campaign'. Clean progress indicator.

pages_and_sections.name: Footer
pages_and_sections.guidelines: Massive space (py-24 or py-32). Massive 'NOXN' logo at text-[10vw].

images.description: Massive futuristic digital billboard glowing intensely in electric orange against a deep navy blue night sky
Abstract tech-forward background, kinetic streaks of neon orange light
LED digital display panel texture showing bright orange pixels
City buildings with large neon signs at night
Smiling young ethnic male waiter near modern food truck

instructions_to_main_agent: ALL interactive elements and key text MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Use pure HTML and Tailwind for marketing page structures. Avoid generic Shadcn 'Cards' that restrict bento grid fluidity.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for tech-forward iconography.
Implement the assessment form using Shadcn inputs and logic, styled heavily to fit the Dark Navy/Orange aesthetic.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use a sharp Grotesk like 'Space Grotesk' or install 'Cabinet Grotesk'/'Clash Display'.
Ensure Lenis is used for smooth scrolling.
Do not add any AI-related features or text.
Use React Hook Form + Zod for the multi-step assessment form.
